bm25_search_docs.name: bm25_search_docs
bm25_search_docs.description: BM25 lexical retrieval over raw text chunks. Useful for exact names, aliases, abbreviations, object names, repeated actions, quotations, and appearance details.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keywords, names, aliases, or exact phrases to match.

lookup_document_ids_by_title.name: lookup_document_ids_by_title
lookup_document_ids_by_title.description: Map section or chapter titles to backing document_ids.

parameters.name: fuzzy
parameters.description: Whether to allow fuzzy title matching. Default true.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matched document_ids. Default 10.

lookup_titles_by_document_ids.name: lookup_titles_by_document_ids
lookup_titles_by_document_ids.description: Map document_ids to readable section or chapter titles.

search_related_content.name: search_related_content
search_related_content.description: Given document_ids and a query, read those documents and extract directly relevant text.

parameters.name: max_length
parameters.description: Maximum extracted text length per document. Default 300.
